query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) as total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client) as total_clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project) as total_proyectos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotation) as total_cotizaciones,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task) as total_tareas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment) as total_citas;
